title: Ninjago: Elemental Extention
description: addon to the addon:Ninjago: Elements Unleashed (Palladium addon)
body:
Ninjago Elemental Extension Addon

Expand your elemental powers with this addon for Palladium and Ninjago: Elements Unleashed!

The Elemental Extension Addon brings new gear, weapons, and abilities to enhance your Ninjago experience while staying true to the original mods.

Features:

Custom Weapons 
New ninja suits and gear
New Blocks and Items

🚧 Work in Progress🚧:
More blocks, items, and features are planned stay tuned!


https://discord.gg/aRXH6vFh6V


Credits

Boutiquedivine made the logo among w a few textures and ideas

Person made the vehicles and the folly spear

Mightcat suit base maker

SwippyBG original mod creator of the Ninjago: Elements Unleashed mod hes a great guy
